segment.source: A list of downloadable files, each shown as a card with a download icon, title, description, file size, and a download button. Use it on resource, press, or documentation pages to offer PDFs, brochures, or assets for the visitor to grab. Key fields are the section headline and the file items, each with a title, short description, the attached file, and a file-size label such as 2.4 MB.
